questions.explanation: x > 5 is True (10 > 5), so the if block runs and prints 'Big'. The else block is skipped.
The line after an if statement must be indented. Python uses indentation to define code blocks.

questions.question: Complete the code to print 'Adult' if age is 18 or more: if age _____ 18:

questions.explanation: 75 >= 90 is False, 75 >= 80 is False, 75 >= 70 is True, so it prints 'C'. Python stops at the first True condition.
25 > 30 is False and 25 < 0 is False, so the or condition is False. The else block runs and prints 'Moderate'.

questions.question: What keyword lets you check another condition after an if statement fails? _____
